overview: Mermaid Corpse is a Normal-class Beast/Undead monster found in Ship Graveyard. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 0 HP, 0 physical damage, 0 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 0, MaxImpactEndurance 0. 4 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Melee Attack2 at 160% ratio (0 base damage).

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 4 melee attacks. Melee Attack1 (150%), Melee Attack2 (160%), Melee Attack1 Nightmare (150%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.
